title: CLOTHING CLOSET - 211info
text: CONTROVERSIAL COFFEE CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Queer owned and operated coffee shop that maintains a clothing closet with gently used, clean clothing and a small food pantry that is subject to availability. Also hosts a community night, providing a safe place for the LGBTQ2SIA+ community to gather and enjoy games and activities. Individuals may request a "Pay It Forward" meal, which covers the cost of a beverage and small food item. Accepts donations of gently used clean clothing, non-perishable food items, and a "Pay It Forward," meal, which covers the cost of a beverage and small food item. 111 Broadway Street Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Monday-Friday 7am-7pm Saturday-Sunday 7am-8pm -Queer Community Night: Monday 6pm-8pm Email (503) 739-0158 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 739-0158 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Walk in, call, or visit website for more information -"Pay It Forward" meal: Scan QR code posted around the cafe to donate FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Clothing Donation Programs General Clothing Provision General Clothing Provision * LGBTQ2+ Individuals LGBTQ2+ Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONTROVERSIAL COFFEE
